title: Create Plus+
description: An Amazing Create modpack with all of the optimization mods you know and love, tons of create add-ons, farmers-delight, and so much more.
body:
Discover an exceptional Create modpack that combines all the optimization mods you love with a vast array of Create add-ons, ensuring an enhanced and seamless gameplay experience. This modpack not only brings the revolutionary Create mod to life but also integrates Farmers Delight and many other exciting modifications. Each and every mod has been carefully selected to complement the core Create experience, providing players with a rich, immersive environment.

For a complete list of included mods and to download the pack, please visit [this link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-plus+/version/latest).

### Credits:
- **All Mod Creators**: A huge thank you to all the talented individuals who have contributed to the mods in this pack. Your creativity and hard work make this modpack possible.

### Special Thanks To:
- **[Stardust Labs](https://modrinth.com/organization/stardust-labs)**: Special thanks for creating [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), adding incredible landscapes and terrain generation that enhance the overall world-building experience.
- **[Simibubi](https://modrinth.com/user/simibubi) and the rest of the Create team**: Special thanks for the creation of the amazing [Create mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- **[P3pp3rf1y](https://www.curseforge.com/members/p3pp3rf1y)**: Special thanks for the creation of [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sophisticated-backpacks) allowing for much more flexibility in storage.
